next_steps: Fix critical security issues (SECRET_KEY, DEBUG mode)
Run full test suite after fixes
Create backup and disaster recovery plan

ml_findings: AI API keys using development values
code_quality_findings: Syntax warnings in some files (minor escape sequences)
Type hints missing in many files

critical.impact: Security vulnerability - can compromise entire system
critical.resolution: Generate strong SECRET_KEY (50+ chars) for production

high.resolution: Set DEBUG = False in production settings

medium.issue: AI API keys using development values
medium.resolution: Configure production API keys for GEMINI, OPENAI, ANTHROPIC

fixes_applied: Installed missing dependencies (celery, redis, dj-database-url, etc.)

blockers: CRITICAL: Weak SECRET_KEY must be fixed
HIGH: DEBUG mode must be disabled

security_issues.recommendation: Generate a strong SECRET_KEY with at least 50 characters

security_issues.issue: Missing security settings: SECURE_SSL_REDIRECT, CSRF_COOKIE_SECURE, SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE...

configuration_issues: DEBUG mode is enabled (should be False in production)
SECRET_KEY is too short (should be at least 50 characters)

recommendations: PRIORITY: Address all security issues before production deployment
Optimize performance: Configure caching and review slow queries
Fix configuration issues: Update settings for production
Implement proper error handling across all modules
Implement rate limiting for API endpoints
Set up CI/CD pipeline for automated testing
Document all API endpoints with OpenAPI/Swagger
Implement model monitoring and drift detection
Set up experiment tracking (MLflow or Weights & Biases)
Implement A/B testing for model versions
Set up automated model retraining triggers
Implement feature store for consistent feature engineering
Implement data validation for ML pipelines

issues_remaining.fix: Generate a strong SECRET_KEY with at least 50 characters
Enable security headers in production settings

issues_remaining.issue: Missing AI API keys: GEMINI_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
issues_remaining.fix: Configure production API keys in environment variables

performance_optimizations: Add database indexes on frequently queried fields
Use select_related() and prefetch_related() for related objects
Compress static files with whitenoise or CDN
Implement Redis caching for session storage
Use asynchronous views for I/O bound operations
Optimize image processing with lazy loading
Enable HTTP/2 for better resource loading

recommendations: Implement rate limiting on login endpoints
Add CAPTCHA after failed login attempts
Enable password history to prevent reuse
Add audit logging for data access
Enable request signing for sensitive operations
